---
pagetitle: "Day 1 Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Day 1 Student Presenters
Monday, 25 May 2026 | 10:30 - 16:45 WIB  
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}
::: {#break_session .g-col-12}
## Guest Lecture 1 — 10:00 - 11:30 WIB | @Auditorium Biologi Tropika

| Time | Event | Title | Speakers |
|---|----|-----------|----------|
| 10.00 - 10.30 | Opening Remarks | | Prof. Dra. Tuty Arisuryanti, M.Sc., Ph.D. (Course Responsible) |
| 10.30 - 11.30 | Guest Lecture 1 | Benefits and Challenges of Marine Spatial Planning for Small Indo-Pacific Islands and Their Socio-Ecosystems | Serge Andrefouet |
| 11.30 - 12.00 | Break           | | |
: {.striped .hover}

:::

::: {#regular_session .g-col-12}
## Regular Session | 12:00 - 15:00 WIB | @Auditorium Biologi Tropika
<div id="schedule-regular"></div>
:::

::: {#iup_session .g-col-12}
## IUP Session | 15:30 - 16:00 WIB | @Auditorium Biologi Tropika
<div id="schedule-iup"></div>
:::

<script src="/js/schedule.js"></script>

<script>
const SCHEDULE_REGULER = {
  files: ["/assets/reguler-senin.json"]
};

const SCHEDULE_IUP = {
  files: ["/assets/iup.json"]
};

renderSchedule("schedule-regular", SCHEDULE_REGULER);
renderSchedule("schedule-iup", SCHEDULE_IUP);
</script>

:::
:::
